message:
feat: show message counts and time ranges in session list

Add metadata parsing to SessionInfo to extract message counts and
time ranges from session files. Messages are counted by counting
'request' type entries. Time range is derived from timestamps in
the _meta blocks.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,8 @@

{{.Date}}

{{.ID}} {{.Host}} + {{.MessageCount}} msgs + {{.TimeRange}}
{{end}} {{end}}
